overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed IV showing a pirate-assassin character exploring a tropical beach at night. The character walks along the shoreline past rocky outcrops, palm trees, and submerged wooden ruins, approaching a distant figure near a beached boat.

events.description: distant sailing ship passes out of view behind horizon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach toward the waterline

entered.detail: calm turquoise ocean water gently lapping the shore
large sailing ship with multiple masts silhouetted on the horizon
smooth sand beach with scattered footprints
distant palm trees and tropical foliage along the coastline

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open tropical beach at night with a large sailing ship visible on the horizon. The sandy shore stretches ahead with calm turquoise water on the right and distant palm trees lining the left side of the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky tropical coastline with dense vegetation

events.description: beach narrows and becomes rockier with dense palm trees and vegetation on the left
character turns slightly left to navigate around a large rock outcrop

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline navigating around rock formations and fallen trees

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation with layered stone surfaces
cluster of tall palm trees with dense fronds
fallen palm tree trunk lying across the sand

segments.scene_description: The beach narrows as the character approaches a rocky section of coastline. Large rock outcrops and dense palm trees line the left side while the character navigates around obstacles including a fallen tree trunk lying across the sand.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal ruins with submerged wooden posts

events.description: weathered wooden posts emerge from the shallow water along the shoreline
passing under overhanging palm tree branches extending over the beach

agents.ego_description: walking past submerged wooden posts and coastal ruins

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts and pilings sticking out of the shallow turquoise water
small rocky islet with palm trees offshore

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an area of coastal ruins where weathered wooden posts emerge from the shallow water. A small palm-covered islet is visible offshore as the beach curves, with overhanging vegetation creating partial cover overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach with beached boat wreck

events.description: beached wooden boat wreck comes into view on the right side of the beach
distant human figure spotted standing on the beach ahead near the waterline

agents.ego_description: approaching a distant figure standing near a beached boat wreck

notable_agents.action: standing still on the beach facing the ocean

entered.detail: wooden boat wreck with broken hull resting on the sand

segments.scene_description: The beach opens up again as the character approaches a wooden boat wreck resting on the sand. A distant figure stands near the waterline ahead, and the coastline curves revealing more open beach and distant hills in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit tropical shoreline that transitions from an open beach into a cluttered coastal ruin before opening up toward a distant figure. It begins on a wide stretch of sand with calm turquoise water to the right and a large sailing ship silhouetted on the horizon. As the character advances, the beach narrows into a rocky corridor where dense palm trees and a fallen tree trunk obstruct the path. The scene then shifts into a section of coastal ruins, moving past weathered wooden posts emerging from the shallow surf under the cover of overhanging vegetation. Finally, the terrain expands once more as the camera approaches a wooden boat wreck resting on the sand, revealing a distant figure standing by the waterline against a backdrop of curving coastlines and far-off hills.
